summary_one_line: IHDR color_type byte (offset 0x19) must equal PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE (3) so the sBIT handler takes the palette branch.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The IHDR color_type field at byte offset 0x19 must hold the exact value 0x03 (PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE); this value is later loaded into png_ptr->color_type and equality-compared against the constant 3 at the blocker line.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every cmplog winner-resolving seed carries 03 at offset 0x19 in the IHDR chunk; the BYTE DIFF shows offset 0x19 is W=03 across all 25 winner samples, and the equality CMP color_type==3 logs the constant 3 into the CmpLogObserver so I2SRandReplace can splice it into the input byte.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive loser-blocking seeds never carry 03 at offset 0x19 (loser bytes are 00/04/06), so png_ptr->color_type never equals 3 and the true branch stays blocked.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog intercepts the equality compare png_ptr->color_type == 3, records the constant operand 3, and I2SRandReplace substitutes 3 at the input offset corresponding to the IHDR color_type byte, directly satisfying the exact-equality gate that naive must hit by blind chance.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same IHDR color_type byte at offset 0x19 must reach the exact value 0x03; value_profile receives gradient credit for inputs whose color_type operand approaches the constant 3.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile resolves the branch in 9/10 trials with avg hitcount 37 on the branch; the required winning byte 03 at offset 0x19 is concentrated in winners (BYTE DIFF: W=03(.)x25 vs L=00/04/06), and value_profile's CMP_MAP awards a new bucket as the color_type operand nears 3, preserving near-miss inputs as corpus stepping stones.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive has no CMP_MAP distance feedback, so an input with color_type=0 or 4 (off by a small Hamming distance from 3) earns no coverage credit and is discarded, leaving naive blocked in 9/10 trials.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP records the operand-distance bucket for the color_type==3 compare; inputs whose color_type byte is closer to 3 add a new bucket and are retained, climbing the Hamming gradient to the exact value, whereas naive's plain edge feedback gives no such gradient.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same IHDR color_type byte at offset 0x19 must equal 0x03; naive_ctx differs from naive only in context-sensitive edge indexing, not in any comparison-solving stage.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: naive_ctx resolves in 9/10 trials (avg hitcount 39); all winner-resolving seeds shown are fuzzer=naive_ctx and carry 03 at offset 0x19, and context-indexed edges distinguish the call paths through png_handle_sBIT, retaining more intermediate corpus entries that carry the palette color_type forward.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: plain naive folds the same edges into a single map slot regardless of call context, so context-distinct paths that preserve a near-palette IHDR are not separately rewarded, and naive stays blocked in 9/10 trials.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: naive_ctx's CtxHook folds the caller chain into the edge-map index so the same edge counts as new coverage when reached via a different call context; this finer feedback retains more corpus diversity (including inputs whose IHDR color_type can be mutated toward 3) but uses the identical havoc/token mutator stack as naive with no CMP introspection.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is an equality test of png_ptr->color_type against PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE, true side globally blocked.
The winning byte value at IHDR offset 0x19 is 0x03 across all winner samples while losers never carry 0x03 there.
cmplog wins the branch in 10/10 trials versus naive's 1/10 with a strong probability divergence.
cmplog's I2SRandReplace scans the input for an operand and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets
any of the above. No I2S.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile wins the branch in 9/10 trials versus naive via the value_profile delta.
value_profile retains as corpus any input that produces a CMP-operand pair closer to matching than previously seen.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile averages 37 hits on the branch for winners with prob_div 0.80.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=37  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: naive_ctx wins the branch in 9/10 trials versus naive via the ctx_coverage delta.
naive_ctx folds call-context into the edge-map index so the same edge is recorded at different slots per call path, and uses naive's mutators with no I2S/CMP_MAP.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
the same basic-block edge is
recorded at different map slots depending on the call path that
reached it.

evidence_trail.claim: naive_ctx uses naive's havoc+token stack with no I2SRandReplace and no CMP_MAP.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
naive's havoc + token stack. No `I2SRandReplace`, no
CMP_MAP.

evidence_trail.claim: The winner-resolving seeds shown were stored by fuzzer naive_ctx and carry 03 at offset 0x19.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 3966 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 14ddd5a497528d88` and observed an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 3; corroborated on seed 4f79a314f98c0243 with a dash row at depth 4. Both cmplog winning chains contain an unwrapped I2SRandReplace ancestor.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on color_type==3 in which cmplog does NOT resolve the branch faster than naive (no dose response to the equality-gate width), which would show I2S substitution is not the operative mechanism.

weakest_evidence_point: The ctx_coverage hypothesis attributes the win to context-indexed corpus retention, but the prompt offers no direct evidence that context-distinct paths through png_handle_sBIT are what preserve near-palette IHDR inputs; it is inferred from mechanism description rather than seed lineage.
